scripts.build: bun engine/generate/post-meta.ts && bun engine/generate/post-versions.ts && bun engine/generate/episode-audio.ts && bun engine/generate/build-html.ts ./index.html ./privacy.html ./posts/*.html && bun engine/generate/copy-static.ts && bun engine/generate/share-card.ts && bun engine/generate/strip-served-html.ts && bun engine/generate/markdown-export.ts && bun engine/generate/feeds.ts && bun engine/generate/site-discovery.ts && bun engine/generate/help-page.ts && bun engine/generate/audit-posts.ts
scripts.deploy: bun engine/generate/verify-narration.ts && bun run build && bun engine/generate/publish-notify.ts --snapshot && wrangler deploy && bun engine/generate/websub-ping.ts && bun engine/generate/publish-notify.ts --notify
